# components/qa

Context-aware Q&A interface components for pitch document interaction, managing question threads, streaming answers, and citation-linked navigation with section-scoped queries.

## Contents

**[qa-panel.tsx](./qa-panel.tsx)** — `QAPanel` component: responsive container (mobile overlay/desktop sidebar) managing `QAMessage[]` state, `useQueryStream` integration, section context scoping (`[Context: ${sectionScope}] ${query}`), citation-click navigation via `onScrollToSection`, auto-submit of `initialQuestion` prop.

**[qa-thread.tsx](./qa-thread.tsx)** — `QAThread` component renders conversation UI from `QAMessage[]`, displays `sectionContext` labels, streaming status ("Thinking..." pulse during `status === "retrieving"`), `CitationList` with `onCitationClick` handler, auto-scrolls on message/answer updates.

**[section-context-chip.tsx](./section-context-chip.tsx)** — `SectionContextChip` badge displays query scope ("Asking about: Entire pitch" when `sectionName` null, else "Asking about: {sectionName}"), includes dismiss button triggering `onDismiss`.

## Data Flow

1. `QAPanel` receives `sectionName`/`sectionId` props from parent viewer, initializes `sectionScope` state
2. User submits question → `handleSubmit` prepends context → `askQuestion(queryText)` from `useQueryStream`
3. `useQueryStream` streams `answer`, `citations`, `status` updates → effect syncs to latest `QAMessage`
4. `QAThread` renders messages with `StreamingAnswer`/`CitationList` components
5. Citation click → `onScrollToSection(chunkId)` → parent scrolls viewer, closes panel on mobile

## Context Management

Section scope persists across questions until dismissed via `SectionContextChip`. Scope prefix applied only when non-null: `[Context: Problem Statement] How does...` vs raw `How does...` for pitch-wide queries. Placeholder text adapts: `Ask about ${sectionScope}...` / `Ask anything about this pitch...`.

## Responsive Behavior

Mobile (<768px): `fixed inset-0` overlay, `translate-y-full` closed state, back arrow, citation clicks close panel. Desktop (≥768px): `440px` right sidebar, `translate-x-full` closed state, close (×) button, citation clicks leave panel open.

## Key Dependencies

`useQueryStream` (from `../../hooks/use-query-stream.ts`) for RAG execution, `QAMessage` type shared with `qa-thread.tsx`, `Citation` from `../query/citation-list.tsx`, `SectionContextChip` for scope UI, `cn` utility.

## Exported Types

- `QAMessage` — `{ id: string; question: string; answer: string; citations: Citation[]; status: QueryStatus; error: string | null; sectionContext: string | null }`
- `QAPanelProps` — `{ open: boolean; onOpenChange: (open: boolean) => void; sectionName: string | null; sectionId: string | null; onScrollToSection: (sectionId: string) => void; initialQuestion?: string | null; onInitialQuestionConsumed?: () => void }`
- `SectionContextChipProps` — `{ sectionName: string | null; onDismiss: () => void }`
